title: clytostoma campanulatum
intro: Clytostoma campanulatum, also known as the Drummond's starflower, is a flowering plant native to the subtropical regions of Eastern Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Clytostoma campanulatum include the treatment of fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
